features: ASSORTED COLOURS: Colour is sent at random. You will receive Beige, Grey, or Cream depending on availability. Colour selection is not guaranteed.
GENEROUS 2 LITRE CAPACITY: Large capacity holds up to 2 litres of hot water, providing long-lasting warmth for hours of soothing comfort
THERAPEUTIC HEAT RELIEF: Ideal for easing muscle aches, period pain, and keeping warm on cold nights, offering natural and comforting heat therapy
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: High-quality rubber bottle designed for reliable, repeated use with secure screw cap to prevent leaks
VERSATILE USE: Perfect for beds, sofas, or chairs, providing warmth and comfort throughout the home during chilly weather
SAFETY STANDARDS: Manufactured to comply with BS 1970:2012 British safety requirements for hot water bottles.
description: Product description This soft teddy fleece hot water bottle by DID combines soothing warmth with luxurious comfort. The 2-litre capacity provides long-lasting heat therapy, perfect for easing aches, pains, and chills on cold evenings. The plush teddy fleece cover feels wonderfully soft against your skin, transforming a practical item into a cosy companion. Whether you're settling down for the night, relaxing on the sofa, or need targeted warmth for sore muscles, this hot water bottle delivers reliable comfort. The generous 2-litre size ensures extended warmth throughout the evening, whilst the soft cover remains gentle and pleasant to touch. Ideal for keeping warm during winter months, providing comfort during times of discomfort, or simply adding a touch of warmth to your relaxation routine. The teddy fleece material offers a tactile, comforting experience that makes this hot water bottle a pleasure to use. A thoughtful addition to any home, this hot water bottle combines functionality with comfort for those seeking warmth and relaxation. Manufactured to comply with BS 1970:2012, meeting recognised UK safety standards for hot water bottles. Indications Pain Relief Directions Fill the hot water bottle with hot water (not boiling), seal it, and apply it to the affected area (back, stomach, or shoulder) with the ribbed side against the skin for better heat retention. Use for pain relief and muscle relaxation. See more
